title: security_review_response
description: Structured output for the security review agent. Use this tool to submit your final review findings.

findings.description: List of security findings. Empty array if no issues found.

file.description: Full file path as shown in the diff

new_line.description: Line number in the new version of the file

old_line.description: Line number in the old version (only for comments on deleted lines)

tier.description: Finding tier: 1 = Exploitable, 2 = Logic Flaw, 3 = Design Issue

body.description: Specific feedback in markdown. Do NOT restate tier/severity/CWE — those are separate fields and are rendered into the comment header automatically.

suggestion.description: Corrected code to replace the commented line(s). Only include when the fix is self-contained and uses existing functions.

summary.description: When no findings exist, provide 3-5 bullet points summarizing security observations. When findings exist, a brief overview of the review.
